name: Ouaker's Best Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Beat margarine and brown sugar together until fluffy.
3. Add granulated sugar, egg, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, salt (if using), nutmeg (if using), and cinnamon; stir into the margarine mixture.
5. Stir in oatmeal.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8-9 minutes for a chewy cookie, or 10-11 minutes for a crisp cookie.
8. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Store in a tightly covered container.
Makes approximately 4 1/2 dozen or 54 cookies.
